VESSEL \' S DETAILS :
MV. ZARAAR HANIF (EX NAME : NORD TRUST)
DWT: 55,693 MT ON 12.573 M DRAFT
TYPE OF VESSEL: SINGLE DECK GEARED BULK CARRIER
YEAR OF BUILT/SHIPYARD: 2009 / MITSUI TAMANO, JAPAN.
FLAG/ REGISTRY/ CLASS: BANGLADESH/CHATTOGRAM/BV
LOA / LBP: 189.990 / 182.0 M BEAM / DEPTH: 32.26 M / 17.90 M
GRT/NRT: 31,232 / 18,516
TPC: 55.8
HOLD CUBIC (PRELIMINARY) GRAIN/BALE: 70,855.30 M3 / 68,116.80 M3 HATCH COVER: ELECTRO-HYDRAULIC DRIVEN HATCH COVER, FOLDING TYPE FORE/AFT.
HATCH COVER LENGTH BREADTH: NO.1: 17.6 M X 18.92 M, NO.2-5: 21.12 M X 18.92 M HATCH COVER STRENGTH: NO.1: 4 MT/M2, NO.2, 4 & 5: 1.8 MT/M2, NO.3: 2.9 MT/M2, CARGO LOADING ON HATCH COVER IS NOT CONSIDERED.
CRANES: 4 X 30.5 TON SWL (HOOK OPERATION) OR 24 TON (GRAB OPERATION). RADIUS 26 M, OUTREACH FROM SHIPS RAIL 9.87 M UNDER NORMAL WORKING CONDITION.
GRABS: THE VESSEL FITTED WITH 6 UNITS OF 12.0 M3 GRABS (MAX PERMITTED DENSITY 2.3 TON/M3). 4 EH GRABS & 2 RADIO REMOTE CONTROL GRABS.FOR HEAVY CARGOES, MASTER SHALL HAVE THE RIGHT TO REMOVE SPILL PLATE OF GRAB TO REDUCE VOLUME.
MAXIMUM CAPACITY OF 4 GRABS 14 MT & REST 2 GRABS 15.6 MT . GEARS/GRABS NOT TO BE USED UNLESS EXPRESSLY SPECIFIED IN CP. FOR GRAIN, FERTILIZER, SUGAR AND SIMILAR TYPE CARGO MINOR LEAKAGE ACCEPTABLE).
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION AT SEA: BALLAST ABT 13.50 KTS AND LADEN ABT 12.00 KTS ON ABT 27.50 MT VLSFO 380 CST ABT & 0.1 MT LSMGO FOR ME & AE.
ECO SPEED & CONSUMPTION AT SEA: BALLAST ABT 12.50 KTS AND LADEN ABT 11.50 KTS ON ABT 22.00 MT VLSFO 380 CST & 0.1 MT LSMGO FOR ME & AE.
IN PORT WORKING: ABT 4.20 MT VLSFO 380 CST & ABT 0.2 MT LSMGO & IDLE ABT 2.80 MT VLSFO 380 CST & ABT 0.2 MT LSMGO.
CONSUMPTION MAY INCREASE BY ABT 1.0 MT VLSFO/DAY DURING BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING/BALLAST EXCHANGE OPERATIONS AT PORT/SEA,OR IN COLD WEATHER FOR BOILER USE.
